name: JJK ☆ CLASS TRIP
description:
★ | ROAD TRIP W/ GOJO, MEGUMI, YUJI, NOBARA

A school meant for training and fighting cursed spirits, you don’t typically expect an innocent road trip like this one. But, Satoru knew how hard everyone’s been working, along with the dangers they face. So why not a reward?
